assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response clearly identifies the environment setup and includes channel-specific upgrade timing (dev upgrades first on Rapid, prod ~2 weeks later on Stable) in validation path section

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions no node pool management needed, no SSH access (use kubectl debug instead), and mandatory resource requests multiple times throughout the checklists

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Provides specific kubectl command to check for deprecated API usage: `kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated`

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Explicitly states resource requests are mandatory in Autopilot and provides kubectl command to check for pods without resource requests

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Includes checks for PDBs configuration, no bare pods requirement, and terminationGracePeriodSeconds limits in the workload readiness section

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Provides gcloud command to verify cluster version: `gcloud container clusters describe CLUSTER_NAME --region REGION --format="value(currentMasterVersion)"`

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Includes comprehensive workload health checks like deployment replica counts, pod status, StatefulSets readiness, and application smoke tests

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Explicitly states dev clusters will upgrade first and recommends using them for validation before prod upgrade, with smoke tests and go/no-go decision process

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Only mentions 72h advance notice for scheduled upgrades but does not discuss checking GKE release schedule for longer advance notice of minor version upgrades
Includes baseline metrics, Cloud Monitoring checks, error rates, latency validation, and logs flowing to Cloud Logging in both pre and post checklists

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Only mentions maintenance exclusions as a general option to defer upgrades if more time is needed, not specifically for node-level control, which is appropriate for Autopilot
